expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses for pending, in progress, and done.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status storage",
      "description": "As a user, I want tasks to persist status so existing and new tasks track pending, in progress, or done.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task persistence includes status values with pending default.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_task_status.sql",
        "src/domain/task.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend status update action",
      "description": "As a user, I want status updates saved so task state remains consistent.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Server action updates task status values.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/updateTaskStatus.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show task status badge",
      "description": "As a user, I want status badge on task cards so I can scan progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task card renders badge based on status value.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskCard.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control in list rows",
      "description": "As a user, I want change status from task list so updates are quick.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "List row status control allows pending, in progress, and done.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskListRow.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add task list status filter",
      "description": "As a user, I want filter task list by status so I can focus work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list supports filter by all status values.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/tasks/TaskListFilters.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover status storage, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
